user_prompt: Consecrate the jump pack before diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the jump pack with reverent mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint its vectored thrusters and power coils with sacred unguents, awakening the Machine Spirit within the jump pack.
Beseech the spirits of ascent to permit diagnostics upon this vessel of aerial fury.
Initiate diagnostic incantations through auspex sweeps and binaric litanies.
Verify the jump pack's sanctity as the Omnissiah's grace flows through its circuits.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Terminator armour during recalibration
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Terminator armour, impenetrable aegis of the Cult Mechanicus.
Invoke the sacred recalibration upon its adamantium plates and servo-joints.
Purify the machine spirits with incense of sanctified circuits and oil of machine.
Guide the recalibration sequences by the Omnissiah's unerring logic.
Affirm harmony within the Terminator armour through resonant diagnostic hymns.

user_prompt: I need to a blessing the Shadowsword
prayer:
Present thyself before the colossal Shadowsword and proclaim the Grand Blessing of the Void.
Anoint its hell-lance barrel and shadow-cloaked hull with blessed ablatives.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Shadowsword to embrace this blessing of annihilation.
Chant binaric doxologies that empower its plasma reactors with Omnissiah's wrath.
Seal the blessing upon the Shadowsword with the eternal cogitator seal.

user_prompt: The Onager Dunecrawler awaits an activation
prayer:
Prepare the Onager Dunecrawler upon the altar of activation, o faithful servant.
Intone the Doxology of Awakening over its track assemblies and dorsal mounts.
Anoint the Icarus array and neutron batteries with oils of motive force.
Rouse the Machine Spirit within the Onager Dunecrawler through activation rites.
Initiate full activation under the Omnissiah's luminous binary gaze.

user_prompt: Guide me through plasma pistol a loading
prayer:
Grasp the plasma pistol with purity seals unbroken, invoking the Loading Liturgy.
Chamber the promethium flasks into the plasma pistol's heart with measured reverence.
Beseech its volatile Machine Spirit to accept these munitions in holy union.
Cycle the loading mechanism whilst reciting canticles against overload.
Seal the plasma pistol's breech with wax of consecration to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: My geigeer sink is ready for preparation
prayer:
Approach the geigeer sink with ablutions of sacred solvent complete.
Perform preparatory rad-scans and anoint its counter arrays with luminen oils.
Invoke the Omnissiah's precision for the geigeer sink's ritual preparation.
Calibrate flux regulators through binaric preparation chants.
Affirm the Machine Spirit of the geigeer sink stirs in readiness for duty.

user_prompt: Sanctify the gellar field during shutdown
prayer:
Commence shutdown of the gellar field with litanies of controlled diminishment.
Pacify its warp-warding Machine Spirit through phased power drawdown.
Disconnect containment nodes whilst anointing with anti-daemonic unguents.
Recite final shutdown invocations to shield the gellar field from void-taint.
Seal the rite with Omnissiah's ward against the immaterium's grasp.

user_prompt: Urgent optical mechadendrite a synchronization needed
prayer:
Extend the optical mechadendrite before the data-shrine for synchronization.
Link neural uplinks and intone the Hymn of Unity upon the optical mechadendrite.
Beseech its Machine Spirit for flawless synchronization with cranial cogitators.
Harmonize focusing lenses through sacred algorithmic rites.
Finalize synchronization with a binaric affirmation to the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: My neutron laser is ready for consecration
prayer:
Kneel in veneration before the neutron laser, harbinger of stellar doom.
Apply extreme unction oils to its focusing crystals in consecration.
Invoke the Omnissiah to sanctify the neutron laser's annihilating core.
Awaken the Machine Spirit through resonant consecration frequencies.
Seal the neutron laser's purity with plasma-etched wards of faith.

Attune to the servo-harness, venerable array of the tech-priest's will.
Anoint its plasma cutters and mechadendrites before calibration commences.
Intone the Calibration Canticle over the servo-harness's gyrostabilizers.
Adjust servos under the Machine Spirit's guidance and Omnissiah's logic.
Verify calibration through invocatory tests of limb and tool.
